name: TheNFTV2
report: A logic flaw allows attackers to repeatedly burn the same NFT and reclaim it. The burn function rewards the caller with $THEDAO tokens and transfers the NFT to a dead address. However, because approvals persist across ownership changes in some implementations or due to improper state cleanup, the attacker can use transferFrom (leveraging a prior approval) to recover the burned token from the dead address—or more likely, re-mint or re-claim it via contract logic—and burn it again, looping to extract unlimited rewards.
